# Terms of Use

Encoding Guard is provided on an "as is" basis, without warranties or guarantees of any kind.

## Use at Your Own Risk

- The plugin is intended to help detect and normalize file encodings safely, but it cannot guarantee recovery of already-corrupted text.
- Users should review backups, version control status, and generated changes before relying on rewritten files.

## Liability

- The author is not liable for data loss, corruption, or downstream issues resulting from use of this plugin.
